scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http-get://localhost:3002/health && wait-on http://localhost:3003 && cross-env ELECTRON_DISABLE_SECURITY_WARNINGS=true electron .
scripts.build:all: pnpm -C ../types build && pnpm -C ../core build && pnpm -C ../server build && pnpm -C ../client build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run bundle:server && electron-builder --win
scripts.build:dir: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run bundle:server && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.build:mac: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run bundle:server && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:linux: pnpm run build:all && pnpm run bundle:server && electron-builder --linux
